title: Nighaṇṭu Dictionary Entry
description: JSONL line schema. Each entry = one dictionary headword.

id.description: Stable globally unique ID. Format: {dict_slug}-{seq}. e.g., 'mw-00001'.

headword.description: Original headword as-is from source (with diacritics, Devanagari, etc.).

headword_norm.description: Normalized search key. NFD + strip combining marks + lowercase, after script detection (Devanagari/HK→IAST). Used for exact lookup.

headword_iast.description: Headword in IAST form (with diacritics preserved). Useful for display.

lang.description: Headword language. skt=Sanskrit, bo=Tibetan, zh=Chinese, pi=Pali.

raw.description: Original markup from source (HTML/XDXF/etc.). Optional, for archival.

plain.description: Plain text body for display + search.

snippet_50.description: Pre-computed 50-char snippet for Zone A. Avoids runtime SUBSTR.

snippet_200.description: Pre-computed 200-char snippet for Zone A summary.

ko.description: Korean translation (when available, e.g. for German/French/Latin sources).

source_meta.description: Source-specific metadata (page number, edition, entry_num, etc.). Free-form.

cross_refs.description: Other entry IDs this entry references (cf., see, etc.). Used for frequency ranking.

body.plain: m. (rarely n.) that which is established or firm, steadfast decree, statute, ordinance, law; usage, practice, customary observance or prescribed conduct, duty; right, justice...
body.snippet_50: m. that which is established or firm, steadfa…
body.snippet_200: m. (rarely n.) that which is established or firm, steadfast decree, statute, ordinance, law; usage, practice, customary observance or prescribed conduct, duty; right…
